# Template — UK GDPR Data Processing Agreement (Art. 28)

**Version:** 1.0.0 (outline)  
**Date:** 2026-06-07  
**Owner:** Legal / DPO  
**Use:** SUP-003, SUP-004, SUP-005 and new UK/EU sub-processors  
**Status:** ✅ Programme outline · 🎯 Legal review and execution per supplier

---

## Parties

- **Controller:** Trancendos Ltd (or customer as controller for B2B2C)
- **Processor:** [Supplier legal name]

## Mandatory clauses (Art. 28(3))

1. Subject matter and duration of processing
2. Nature and purpose of processing
3. Types of personal data and categories of data subjects
4. Processor obligations:
   - Process only on documented instructions
   - Confidentiality of personnel
   - Security measures (Annex II — reference POL-SEC-001 / ISO 27001)
   - Sub-processor approval and flow-down
   - Assist with DSR, DPIA, breach notification
   - Delete or return data at termination
   - Audit rights
5. International transfers — UK IDTA or EU SCCs + UK Addendum (Annex III)
6. Liability and indemnity (Legal to draft)

## Annexes

| Annex | Content |
|-------|---------|
| I | Processing details (ROPA extract) |
| II | Technical and organisational measures |
| III | Transfer mechanism / sub-processor list |

## Execution checklist

- [ ] Legal review complete
- [ ] DPO sign-off on Annex I–II
- [ ] Row updated in [supplier_dpa_register.yaml](../../compliance/supplier_dpa_register.yaml)
- [ ] ROPA and customer sub-processor schedule updated

**Related:** [SUPPLIER-DPA-REGISTER.md](../compliance/SUPPLIER-DPA-REGISTER.md) · ACT-001, ACT-002
